TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Manzhou, title = Manzhou, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Manzhou} }

S.FORM: = Manzhou = Nsgan Manzhou o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 147.35 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 74.2 km², dxgal pmblxan o 7.17 km²). Kmhbragan hiyi o 1,329, sapah o 490, seejiq tnpusu 802 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 60%(Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Manzhou o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 3. 3 o, Ride , Parius , Tjadukudukung . Pusu pnyahan patas
S.PHON: = man*ħou = nsgan man*ħou o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o *.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o ***, səəɟiq tnpusu *** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan man*ħou o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, ɾidə , paɾius , tɟadukudukuŋ . pusu pnjaħan patas
S.FORM: = Manzhou = Nsgan Manzhou o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 147.35 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 74.2 km², dxgal pmblxan o 7.17 km²). Kmhbragan hiyi o 1,329, sapah o 490, seejiq tnpusu 802 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 60%(Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Manzhou o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 3. 3 o, Ride , Parius , Tjadukudukung . Pusu pnyahan patas
S.PHON: = man*ħou = nsgan man*ħou o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o *.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o ***, səəɟiq tnpusu *** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan man*ħou o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, ɾidə , paɾius , tɟadukudukuŋ . pusu pnjaħan patas
